name: sistema-pedidos-off-grid
description: Sistema de Pedidos 100% Offline com Rede Local

scripts.dev: npm run -w apps/server dev & npm run -w apps/frontend dev
scripts.build: npm run -w apps/server build && npm run -w apps/frontend build
scripts.type-check: npm run -w apps/server type-check && npm run -w apps/frontend type-check
scripts.lint: npm run -w apps/server lint && npm run -w apps/frontend lint
